tensions.actual: Results show desired text and parent breadcrumb only. No match explanation, no highlighting, no score display.
tensions.desired: search results show relevance context — which terms matched, why this result ranked here, snippet highlighting

tensions.actual: Hash embedder captures lexical overlap (bag-of-words via FNV-1a). Upgrade: features=["semantic"] adds model2vec/fastembed. PhaseGate learns per-corpus when quality tier helps. Zero code changes.
tensions.desired: quality embedder activated — semantic search finds tensions by meaning not just vocabulary overlap, Phase 2 refines results when it adds value

tensions.actual: AdaptiveColor theme complete. 19 semantic slots with dark/light variants. All 188+ old refs replaced. Bold adapts (white-on-dark, black-on-light). 3 theme tests. Bayesian diff: root cause confirmed (ftui reset_for_frame fills WHITE cells + mark_all_dirty = oscillation), stays disabled pending ftui upstream fix. Noted on #127.
tensions.desired: rendering foundation — AdaptiveColor theme replaces hardcoded palette, Bayesian diff re-enabled with proper evidence tracking. Delivers dark/light adaptation. Resolves #101 and #127 as side effects

tensions.actual: All checkpoints met. Three-pane spatial model (desire/field/reality) via LayoutState.split(). FocusGraph skeleton with 7 nodes. Responsive breakpoints: Compact (<80) hides gutter+ages, Standard (80-120) hides ages, Expansive (>120) shows all. Content centering unified in layout.rs. 0 errors, 0 warnings, 487 tests pass.
tensions.desired: spatial skeleton — PaneLayout three-pane (desire/field/reality) with drag-resize and snap points, Focus graph replaces cursor arithmetic, Responsive breakpoints for compact/standard/expansive regimes

tensions.actual: Steps 1-5 complete. Toast system (NotificationQueue, BottomRight, 3 max, auto-dismiss via Cmd::Tick chain) replaces TransientMessage. Modal overlays with backdrop dimming + center_modal() on all 5 overlay types. GestureHistory with StateSnapshot capture on begin_gesture/end_gesture. Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Shift+Z wired for undo/redo with toast feedback. CommandPalette on Ctrl+K with 15 registered actions, fuzzy search, dispatch to same code paths as keybindings. Msg::Redo, Msg::OpenPalette, Msg::PaletteAction added.
tensions.desired: interaction model — Modal overlays replace 10 input modes, CommandPalette unifies search/command/navigation, Undo transactions make gestures explorative, Toast notifications replace TransientMessage

tensions.actual: Steps A-F complete. cached_frontier: Option<Frontier> replaced with frontier: Frontier (always valid). ensure_frontier() deleted. Manual invalidation (cached_frontier = None) replaced with recompute_frontier() calls. StateSnapshot updated: deck_cursor_index replaced with focus_active: FocusId. All 25 tests pass. DeckCursor still present as sync bridge — full removal deferred to cleanup pass
tensions.desired: widget migration — deck zones use List widget, survey uses Tree + VirtualizedList, reactive state (Observable/Computed/Binding) replaces manual cache invalidation. deck.rs and survey.rs rewritten on ftui widgets

tensions.actual: no session persistence — every launch starts fresh. No TUI testing infrastructure. No inspector. Manual testing only
tensions.desired: polish and infrastructure — Workspace persistence (pane proportions, cursor, expansion state across sessions), development tools (Inspector overlay, Program simulator for CI testing, Input macros for regression, Asciicast recording)

tensions.actual: Engine has gesture lifecycle (begin/end/active_gesture) and mutations store old_value, but no reversal method exists. All mutations are append-only. Phase 3 TUI undo (#164) works without this by snapshotting UI state, but full undo requires sd-core support.
tensions.desired: gesture undo at the database level — Engine.undo_gesture(gesture_id) reverses mutations using stored old_value, enabling Ctrl+Z in TUI to actually reverse structural changes not just restore UI state
